大发大单小双三期必中秘诀【网：59FC·CC】【网：95FC·CC】【QQ：5075273】【网：35FC·CC】<浏览器手动输入网址>【首单返利50%】【来富彩，马上发】【富彩祝您】【鸿运当头好运来】【财源滚滚为您开】【精彩纷呈乐不停】【大奖小奖进家门】JINYUAN666《金源导师》<br>原文翻译及赏析_作者李白<br>青天有月来几时？我今停杯一问之。<br>人攀明月不可得，月行却与人相随。<br>皎如飞镜临丹阙，绿烟灭尽清辉发。<br>但见宵从海上来，宁知晓向云间没。<br>白兔捣药秋复春，嫦娥孤栖与谁邻？<br>今人不见古时月，今月曾经照古人。<br>古人今人若流水，共看明月皆如此。<br>唯愿当歌对酒时，月光长照金樽里。<br>[![66.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/SsTM0tXD/66.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/hzmjTs1d)<br>[![67.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/C1kx7PGg/67.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/CBM0L4rP)<br>[![68.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/NM6QmycS/68.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/r0p6LwzN)<br>[![82.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/4NNXHNSg/82.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/z3Ms95Nt)<br>[![83.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/DwRhNQy8/83.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/K17CkMT2)<br>[![84.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/1XWhrwj1/84.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/dZTxqkF5)<br>------------------<br>vk.com/topic-238909174_62512007<br>vk.com/topic-238909187_63957781<br>vk.com/topic-238909910_63627672<br>vk.com/topic-238909206_62870456<br>vk.com/topic-238909178_63009963<br>vk.com/topic-238909182_63117969<br>vk.com/topic-238881989_63321457<br>vk.com/topic-238909176_62870518<br>vk.com/topic-238855676_62870572<br>vk.com/topic-238909175_62426121<br>vk.com/topic-238909190_63627848<br>vk.com/topic-238904641_64175626<br>vk.com/topic-238909184_62512314<br>vk.com/topic-238909928_63010204<br>vk.com/topic-238909207_63958096<br>vk.com/topic-238909180_63627954<br>vk.com/topic-238909188_63010262<br>vk.com/topic-238909187_63958139<br>vk.com/topic-238909177_63958181<br>vk.com/topic-238881989_63321721<br>vk.com/topic-238909183_62743574<br>vk.com/topic-238909182_63118301<br>vk.com/topic-238855676_62870926<br>vk.com/topic-238909176_62870919<br>vk.com/topic-238909172_63118371<br>vk.com/topic-238901981_64175998<br>vk.com/topic-238909190_63628202<br>vk.com/topic-238909186_62871093<br>vk.com/topic-238888951_64176087<br>vk.com/topic-238909928_63010594<br>vk.com/topic-238909189_63321939<br>vk.com/topic-238909180_63628317<br>vk.com/topic-238909188_63010663<br>vk.com/
